content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Camp Schedule". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1138/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of activities. Then n lines follow, each containing two integers ai and bi, the start and end times of the ith activity.
content.outputFormat: Output the maximum number of activities that can be performed by a single person.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the activities by their end times and then select the activities greedily.
